title: Pensions schemes newsletter 171 — July 2025
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes. Pension schemes newsletter 171 has articles on:   reforms to inheritance tax on pensions lifetime allowance protections and enhancements — authenticated look up service relief at source Managing pension schemes service pension flexibility statistics qualifying recognised overseas pension schemes (QROPS) transfer data  "
